post.description:
Generate a new wallet address or retrieve an existing one for the specified sub-wallet.

Addresses can only be generated for recharge coins.

get.description: Retrieve the Sandbox assets(balance) of Prime Wallet with optional filters for coin.

parameters.name: coin
parameters.description: The `token` name

parameters.name: pageNo
parameters.description: The page number for pagination

parameters.name: pageLimit
parameters.description: The number of items per page for pagination

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Sandbox wallet addresses.

parameters.name: coin
parameters.description: The coin type to filter addresses by

parameters.name: chain
parameters.description: The blockchain network to filter addresses by

parameters.name: pageLimit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results per page

parameters.name: pageNo
parameters.description: The page number for paginated results

get.summary: Sandbox Get List of Wallet Addresses

post.description: Create a new sub-wallet with optional user and label information.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Sub-wallets, optionally filtered by subWalletId, chain, or coin.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: The email associated with the sub-wallet.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the sub-wallet.

parameters.name: clientUserId
parameters.description: The client user ID associated with the sub-wallet.

parameters.name: pageNo
parameters.description: The page number for pagination.

parameters.name: pageLimit
parameters.description: The limit of results per page.

get.summary: Sandbox Get List of Sub Wallets

post.description:
Generate a new wallet address or retrieve an existing one for the specified sub-wallet.

Addresses can only be generated for recharge coins.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Sandbox sub-wallet addresses.

parameters.name: subWalletId
parameters.description: The ID of the sub-wallet for retrieving addresses

parameters.name: coin
parameters.description: The coin type to filter addresses by

parameters.name: chain
parameters.description: The blockchain network to filter addresses by

parameters.name: pageLimit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results per page

parameters.name: pageNo
parameters.description: The page number for paginated results

get.summary: Sandbox Get List of sub-Wallet Addresses

get.description: Retrieve the Sandbox assets(balance) of a sub-wallet with optional filters for chain and coin.

parameters.name: subWalletId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the sub wallet

parameters.name: coin
parameters.description: The `token` name

parameters.name: pageNo
parameters.description: The page number for pagination

parameters.name: pageLimit
parameters.description: The number of items per page for pagination

post.description: Transfer funds from one `sub-wallet to another sub-wallet` or from one `sub-wallet to a prime wallet` within the same system. `This operation is free, and no fees are collected for these internal transfers.`
Transfer funds from one sub-wallet to the workspace prime wallet workspace. `This operation is free, and no fees are collected for these internal transfers.`
post.summary: Sandbox Transfer from Sub-Wallets to Prime Wallet

post.description:
Withdraw funds from a wallet/sub-wallet to an external address. To estimate the withdrawal fee, use the [Fee Estimate](/reference/feecontroller_estimatefee) endpoint.

The network fee is automatically deducted from the specified amount, and the remaining balance is sent to the receiver

get.description: Retrieve withdrawal details of Sub-wallet using its subWalletId, withdrawId.

parameters.name: subWalletId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the sub wallet

parameters.name: withdrawId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the withdrawal

post.description: Simulates a deposit event in the OpenXSwitch Sandbox environment.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific sub-wallet deposit using its subWalletId, depositId.

parameters.name: subWalletId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the sub wallet

parameters.name: depositId
parameters.description: The deposit identifier

post.description:
Withdraw funds from prime wallet to an external address. To estimate the withdrawal fee, use the [Fee Estimate](/reference/feecontroller_estimatefee) endpoint.

The **network fee** is automatically deducted from the specified amount, and the remaining balance is sent to the receiver

get.description: Returns a real-time quote for converting a given amount of a source coin into a target coin. Includes estimated fee, swap price, and output amount.

parameters.name: fromCoin
parameters.description: Source coin symbol

parameters.name: fromAmount
parameters.description: Amount of the source coin

parameters.name: toCoin
parameters.description: Target coin symbol

get.summary: Sandbox Get instant swap quote price

post.description: Executes an instant swap based on a previously fetched quote or directly using coin and amount inputs. Returns swap confirmation with details.
post.summary: Sandbox Create a new instant swap order

post.description: Provides a non-committal estimate of potential returns and trading fees based on the input parameters. This endpoint does not execute any trade but helps users evaluate the outcome of a potential transaction.
post.summary: Sandbox Preview trade returns and fees
Sandbox Create buy or sell order

info.title: Sandbox
info.description: OpenXSwitch Developer API Reference for Sandbox/Simulation Environment

clientUserId.description: Client user ID associated with the wallet

email.description: Email address associated with the wallet

permList.description: List of permissions for the wallet

canTrade.description: Flag indicating whether trading is allowed for the wallet

workspaceId.description: Workspace ID associated with the wallet
Workspace ID associated with this address

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the address was created

coin.description:
The `token` name. Only rechargeable currencies are accepted.

Refer to the [Get Recharge Currencies](/reference/mixcontroller_getrechargeablecurrencies) endpoint for the list of supported currencies.

chain.description: The blockchain network on which the address is being generated

coin.description: The symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH)

balance.description: The available balance for withdrawal or transactions

frozen.description: The balance that is temporarily frozen (e.g., for orders)

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of the last update

clientUserId.description: Client user ID associated with the sub-wallet

email.description: Email address associated with the wallet

canTrade.description: Flag indicating whether trading is allowed for the wallet

createdAt.description: Date when the wallet was created

updatedAt.description: Date when the wallet was last updated

workspaceId.description: Workspace ID associated with the wallet

email.description: Email associated with the sub-wallet (max 50 characters)

name.description: The name of the sub-wallet (max 50 characters)

clientUserId.description: The client user ID associated with the sub-wallet

workspaceId.description: Workspace ID associated with this address

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the address was created

subWalletId.description: The ID of the sub-wallet for which the address is being generated

coin.description:
The `token` name. Only rechargeable currencies are accepted.

Refer to the [Get Recharge Currencies](/reference/mixcontroller_getrechargeablecurrencies) endpoint for the list of supported currencies.

chain.description: The blockchain network on which the address is being generated

id.description: The unique identifier for the transfer

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID associated with the transaction

clientTxId.description: The client transaction ID, if available

status.description: The current status of the withdrawal

networkFee.description: The network fee for the transaction

tagMemo.description: Additional memo or tag for the transaction

confirmed.description: Indicates whether the transaction is confirmed

confirmedAt.description: The timestamp when the transaction was confirmed

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the transaction was created

fromWalletId.description: The unique identifier of the source Wallet/Sub wallet

toWalletId.description: The unique identifier of the destination Wallet/Sub wallet

clientTxId.description: Unique ID for tracking the client's request.

coin.description:
The `token` name. Only rechargeable currencies are accepted.

Refer to the [Get Recharge Currencies](/reference/mixcontroller_getrechargeablecurrencies) endpoint for the list of supported currencies.

subWalletId.description: The unique identifier of the source Sub wallet

clientTxId.description: Unique ID for tracking the client's request.

coin.description:
The `token` name. Only rechargeable currencies are accepted.

Refer to the [Get Recharge Currencies](/reference/mixcontroller_getrechargeablecurrencies) endpoint for the list of supported currencies.

id.description: The unique identifier for the withdrawal

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID associated with the transaction

clientTxId.description: The client transaction ID, if available

chain.description:
The 'chain' name.

Refer to the [Get Recharge Currencies](/reference/mixcontroller_getrechargeablecurrencies) endpoint for the list of supported chains.

network.description: The blockchain network for the withdrawal

status.description: The current status of the withdrawal

networkFee.description: The network fee for the transaction

tagMemo.description: Additional memo or tag for the transaction

confirmation.description: The number of confirmations for the transaction

confirmedAt.description: The timestamp when the transaction was confirmed

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the transaction was created

subWalletId.description: The unique identifier of the sub wallet

clientTxId.description: Unique ID for tracking the client's request.

coin.description:
The `token` name. Only rechargeable currencies are accepted.

Refer to the [Get Recharge Currencies](/reference/mixcontroller_getrechargeablecurrencies) endpoint for the list of supported currencies.

chain.description:
The 'chain' name.

Refer to the [Get Recharge Currencies](/reference/mixcontroller_getrechargeablecurrencies) endpoint for the list of supported chains.

fee.description: fee is optional as the system automatically selects the best possible fee to minimize transaction delays and ensure faster processing. Use the [Fee Estimate](/reference/feecontroller_estimatefee) endpoint to estimate the fee.

memo.description: An optional memo for the withdrawal

depositId.description: The unique identifier for the deposit

coin.description:
The `token` name. Only rechargeable currencies are accepted.

Refer to the [Get Recharge Currencies](/reference/mixcontroller_getrechargeablecurrencies) endpoint for the list of supported currencies.

fromAddress.description: Source address for the deposit; required when the destination type is "on_chain"

toAddress.description: Destination address for the deposit; required when the destination type is "on_chain"

fromWalletId.description: The unique id of source the wallet/sub-wallet; required when the destination type is "internal_transfer"

toWalletId.description: The unique id of destination the wallet/sub-wallet; required when the destination type is "internal_transfer"

status.description: Status of the deposit, supported status(pending, updated, success)

id.description: Unique identifier for the deposit operation

workspaceId.description: The workspace associated with the deposit

fromWalletId.description: The wallet/sub-wallet the deposit originated from

toWalletId.description: The wallet/sub-wallet the deposit was credited to

chain.description:
The 'chain' name.

Refer to the [Get Recharge Currencies](/reference/mixcontroller_getrechargeablecurrencies) endpoint for the list of supported chains.

network.description: Blockchain network used for the deposit

transactionLink.description: Blockchain explorer link for the transaction

tagMemo.description: Tag or memo associated with the deposit

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the deposit was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the deposit was last updated

id.description: The unique identifier for the withdrawal

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID associated with the transaction

clientTxId.description: The client transaction ID, if available

chain.description:
The 'chain' name.

Refer to the [Get Recharge Currencies](/reference/mixcontroller_getrechargeablecurrencies) endpoint for the list of supported chains.

network.description: The blockchain network for the withdrawal

status.description: The current status of the withdrawal

networkFee.description: The network fee for the transaction

tagMemo.description: Additional memo or tag for the transaction

confirmation.description: The number of confirmations for the transaction

confirmedAt.description: The timestamp when the transaction was confirmed

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the transaction was created

clientTxId.description: Unique ID for tracking the client's request.

coin.description:
The `token` name. Only rechargeable currencies are accepted.

Refer to the [Get Recharge Currencies](/reference/mixcontroller_getrechargeablecurrencies) endpoint for the list of supported currencies.

chain.description:
The 'chain' name.

Refer to the [Get Recharge Currencies](/reference/mixcontroller_getrechargeablecurrencies) endpoint for the list of supported chains.

fee.description: fee is optional as the system automatically selects the best possible fee to minimize transaction delays and ensure faster processing. Use the [Fee Estimate](/reference/feecontroller_estimatefee) endpoint to estimate the fee.

memo.description: An optional memo for the withdrawal

ts.description: Timestamp of the swap in ISO format

quoteId.description: Quote ID used for this swap

extId.description: External reference ID from client's system.

instantSync.description: Immediately sync wallet asset instead of queuing the sync job (default is queued)

feeCoin.description: Fee coin, coin obtained from the trade

priceAvg.description: Last price of the pair symbol in quote coin

symbol.description:
The trading pair symbol (e.g., BTCUSDT).

Refer to the [Get Trading pairs](/reference/marketcontroller_gettradingpairs) endpoint for the list of pair symbol.

side.description: The side of the trade (buy or sell).

quantity.description: The amount/quantity of the trade in the base or quote coin.

requestWindow.description: Time window in unix milliseconds within which the request is valid.

walletId.description: The ID of the wallet or sub-wallet associated with the order.

clientTxId.description: A unique client-generated trade ID for the order.

symbol.description:
The trading pair symbol (e.g., BTCUSDT).

Refer to the [Get Trading pairs](/reference/marketcontroller_gettradingpairs) endpoint for the list of pair symbol.

orderType.description: The type of order (market or limit).

price.description: The price per unit of the *amount* for a limit order (required for limit orders).

side.description: The side of the order (buy or sell).

quantity.description:
The amount of the order.

For *limit and market-sell orders*, it represents the number of *base coins*. For *market-buy orders*, it represents the number of *quote coins*.

requestWindow.description: Time window in unix milliseconds within which the request is valid (e.g., 5000 = 5 seconds).
